positive: Stylized circular emblem featuring a mythical forest scene viewed through a crescent moon aperture. The central composition showcases deeply intertwined bioluminescent flora and stylized woodland creatures (deer, foxes) rendered in minimalist, elegant silhouettes. Strong contrast between matte blacks, deep indigo, and luminous teal accents. Lighting should suggest a dark, mystical twilight. Clean linework, high contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel, vector-style digital painting, intricate pattern element, centralized design.
